steps: Go to https://linear.app and log in to your workspace
Click your avatar or workspace name in the top-left corner
Scroll down to the 'API keys' section
Enter a descriptive name for your key and optionally set permissions (Read, Write, Admin) and team restrictions
Copy the generated API key immediately — it will not be shown again
notes: API key is shown only once at creation time — store it securely
Linear uses a GraphQL API; all requests go to the /graphql endpoint
You can restrict a key to specific teams or permission levels
Workspace admins can control whether members can create their own API keys under Settings > Administration > API
Free tier available with up to 3 active members

test_endpoint.description: Send a GraphQL query { viewer { id name email } } to verify the key returns the authenticated user
